description_long: This chest of drawers features a tall, rectangular form with a light wood grain finish, giving it a modern and neutral appearance. The front side is equipped with four evenly spaced drawers, each fitted with a small, round black knob for easy access. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, showcasing the natural wood texture without any decorative embellishments. The back panel is plain and matches the wood grain of the rest of the structure. The overall construction appears sturdy, with straight legs integrated into the frame. This piece is suitable for storage in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or residential hallways.
description: A tall, light wood chest of drawers with four drawers and round black knobs, featuring a simple, modern design and a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat wood panel with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a flat, unembellished wood surface with visible grain patterns.
description_view_2: The front view reveals four drawers, each with a round black knob, highlighting the main functional aspect of the chest.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a flat wood surface with natural grain and no additional features.
